description: Style NoteIn earthy tones, coolers comes up with this sharp pair of sandals for a great look this spring. Sandals needn't necessarily tone down your casual ensemble - this pair is the right choice to perfectly offset your summer look. Style this with fitted trousers or cargo shorts for maximum impact.Product DetailsClay brown shiny upper with braid style criss cross midfoot and forefoot strapsHas a buckled ankle loop and a padded footbedTough rubber outsole, well-raised at the heel with grooves all overMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirt
